allow: PowerShell($php = \(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\laragon\\bin\\php' -Directory | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName + '\\php.exe'; $files = @\('inc/admin/settings.php','inc/stripe/plans.php','inc/bootstrap.php'\); $bad = 0; foreach \($f in $files\) { $out = & $php -l $f 2>&1; if \($out -notmatch 'No syntax errors'\) { Write-Output "FAIL: $f"; Write-Output $out; $bad++ } }; if \($bad -eq 0\) { Write-Output 'All files lint clean.' })
